revenue.name: Total Revenue
revenue.description: Total sales revenue from all completed orders
revenue.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_total), 0) as revenue FROM fact_sales WHERE status = 'completed'

gross_profit.name: Gross Profit
gross_profit.description: Revenue minus cost of goods sold
gross_profit.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gross_profit), 0) as gross_profit FROM fact_sales WHERE status = 'completed'

net_profit.name: Net Profit
net_profit.description: Revenue minus all expenses (COGS + operating expenses)
net_profit.sql: WITH revenue AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_total), 0) as total_revenue FROM fact_sales WHERE status = 'completed' ), cogs AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity * cost_price), 0) as total_cogs FROM fact_sales WHERE status = 'completed' ), operating_expenses AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) as total_expenses FROM fact_expenses ) SELECT (total_revenue - total_cogs - total_expenses) as net_profit FROM revenue, cogs, operating_expenses

cash_runway.name: Cash Runway
cash_runway.description: Number of months until cash runs out at current burn rate
cash_runway.sql: WITH monthly_burn AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', date) as month, SUM(amount) as monthly_expenses FROM fact_expenses GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date) ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 3 ), avg_monthly_burn AS ( SELECT AVG(monthly_expenses) as avg_burn FROM monthly_burn ), current_cash AS ( SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'inflow' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) as cash_balance FROM fact_cash_flow ) SELECT CASE WHEN avg_burn > 0 THEN cash_balance / avg_burn ELSE 999 END as cash_runway_months FROM current_cash, avg_monthly_burn

top_products.name: Top Selling Products
top_products.sql: SELECT dp.product_name, dp.category, SUM(fs.line_total) as revenue, SUM(fs.quantity) as units_sold FROM fact_sales fs JOIN dim_products dp ON fs.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE fs.status = 'completed' GROUP BY dp.product_id, dp.product_name, dp.category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

marketing_roi.name: Marketing ROI
marketing_roi.description: Return on investment for marketing campaigns
marketing_roi.sql: SELECT dc.campaign_name, dc.platform, SUM(fm.spend) as total_spend, SUM(fm.revenue_attributed) as attributed_revenue, ((SUM(fm.revenue_attributed) - SUM(fm.spend)) / SUM(fm.spend)) * 100 as roi_percentage FROM fact_marketing fm JOIN dim_campaigns dc ON fm.campaign_id = dc.campaign_id GROUP BY dc.campaign_id, dc.campaign_name, dc.platform HAVING SUM(fm.spend) > 0 ORDER BY roi_percentage DESC

avg_order_value.name: Average Order Value
avg_order_value.sql: SELECT AVG(line_total) as avg_order_value FROM fact_sales WHERE status = 'completed'
